title: pimpinella neglecta
intro: Pimpinella neglecta, also known as Black Caraway or Pippali, is a plant species in the carrot family (Apiaceae) that is native to the Himalayan region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Pimpinella neglecta include its ability to support respiratory health, alleviate digestive issues, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including colds, coughs, and digestive problems.
